initiatives.name: Portland Outright
initiatives.description: Portland Outright is a youth-led, membership organization building the power of LGBTQ+ young people in Maine (aged 14-25) through intersectional organizing for LGBTQ+, racial, and economic justice.

initiatives.name: Portland Anarchist Collective
initiatives.description: Portland and Southern Maine anarchists fighting for a world free from all forms of domination and coercion.

initiatives.name:
Portland Maine Street Medic
              Collective
initiatives.description: anti-fascist collective of street medics & nurses providing medical & first aid support to marginalized communities and frontline liberation activists

initiatives.name: Food Not Bombs Maine
initiatives.description: join us in organizing free food distribution to our community

initiatives.name: People's March Portland ME
initiatives.description: Portland Maine chapter of the People's March, formerly the Women's March,a volunteer led community organization with members in Central & Southern ME

initiatives.name: Portland Tenants Union
initiatives.description: Our goal is to educate tenants about their rights and support them in addressing violations with their landlord and the City of Portland.
